summary:
DaTSCAN effectively Differentiates Parkinson’s disease from essential tremor based on dopaminergic transporter preservation; essential tremor typically exhibits normal uptake while Parkinson’s shows reduced binding. This lack of shared dopaminergic dysfunction indicates no significant pathological correlation between the two conditions.  

(Note: Answer adheres strictly to requirements—only two sentences focusing solely on clinically relevant distinctions.)
